bottlenecks.label: ⚡ 3X Stunt Race Series THIS WEEK
bottlenecks.solution: Take advantage of 3X Stunt Race Series before it expires.
bottlenecks.detail: Expires Jul 13 (8 days left). 3X bonus active — prioritize this over normal activities.

bottlenecks.label: ⚡ 2X Bunker Sell Missions THIS WEEK
bottlenecks.solution: Sell at ~25% stock ($175k base -> $350k this week) to guarantee a single delivery vehicle solo. Pairs with the FREE Lago Zancudo Bunker for new owners.
bottlenecks.detail: Expires Jul 13 (8 days left). 2X bonus active — prioritize this over normal activities.

bottlenecks.label: ⚡ 2X Bunker Research Missions + 2X Research Speed THIS WEEK
bottlenecks.solution: Best week of the year to unlock MK II upgrades — research accrues at double speed.
bottlenecks.detail: Expires Jul 13 (8 days left). 2X bonus active — prioritize this over normal activities.

bottlenecks.label: ⚡ 2X Ammu-Nation Contract Missions THIS WEEK
bottlenecks.solution: Take advantage of 2X Ammu-Nation Contract Missions before it expires.
bottlenecks.detail: Expires Jul 13 (8 days left). 2X bonus active — prioritize this over normal activities.

bottlenecks.label: ⚡ 2X Community Series THIS WEEK
bottlenecks.solution: Take advantage of 2X Community Series before it expires.
bottlenecks.detail: Expires Jul 13 (8 days left). 2X bonus active — prioritize this over normal activities.

bottlenecks.label: ⚠️ 2X Running Back (Remix) (Requires Other Players)
bottlenecks.detail: Expires Jul 13 (8 days left). 2X bonus active but requires multiplayer. Consider briefly joining a friend’s org to earn the one-time challenge reward, then return to solo.

bottlenecks.label: ⚡ 5X G's Cache (GTA+ only this week) THIS WEEK
bottlenecks.solution: Daily freemode pickup — ~$50k base becomes ~$250k for GTA+ members. Check the G's Cache toast on session join.
bottlenecks.detail: Expires Jul 13 (8 days left). 5X bonus active — prioritize this over normal activities.

bottlenecks.label: ⚡ 2X KnoWay Out Missions (GTA+ only this week) THIS WEEK
bottlenecks.solution: Take advantage of 2X KnoWay Out Missions (GTA+ only this week) before it expires.
bottlenecks.detail: Expires Jul 13 (8 days left). 2X bonus active — prioritize this over normal activities.

bottlenecks.label: ⚡ 2X Smuggler (Hangar) Sell Missions (GTA+ only this week) THIS WEEK
bottlenecks.solution: Pairs with 60% off Hangars + upgrades — cheapest week to enter the Smuggler business.
bottlenecks.detail: Expires Jul 13 (8 days left). 2X bonus active — prioritize this over normal activities.

bottlenecks.label: 💪 Prep for Auto Shop Combat (Low Strength)
bottlenecks.solution: 1. Max Strength (30 min) - reduces damage taken. 2. Stock 10+ Snacks + 10 Super Heavy Armor. 3. Visit Agency armory for free snacks if owned.
bottlenecks.detail: Rank 1 = ~50% max health. Strength is 0% (low). Before grinding Auto Shop finales: Max Strength (30 min), stock snacks/armor. Without prep: high failure rate on Union Depository/Lost MC finales.

bottlenecks.label: Strength Critical for Survival
bottlenecks.solution: Launch "Pier Pressure" mission → Punch NPCs (20 mins, free)
bottlenecks.detail: Strength provides damage resistance in all combat situations (not just melee). Low strength means you take significantly more damage from bullets, explosions, and falls. Critical for surviving Auto Shop contracts, heists, and PVP.

bottlenecks.label: Flying Skill Low
bottlenecks.solution: Buy Sparrow ($1.8M) OR do Flight School
bottlenecks.detail: No fast travel vehicle. Turbulence causes crashes and wastes time.

bottlenecks.label: Rank Under 50 (Max Health & Armor Locked)
bottlenecks.solution: Run missions & heists (Cayo, Auto Shop, Security Contracts for RP + $). Rank 1 needs active grinding.
bottlenecks.detail: Rank 1 = ~50% max health. You die instantly in Auto Shop raids. Cannot carry full body armor. Makes combat-heavy content much harder.

bottlenecks.label: No Kosatka Submarine
bottlenecks.solution: Purchase Kosatka ($2.2M) from Warstock for Cayo Perico access (~$560k/hr solo)
bottlenecks.detail: Unlocks Cayo Perico Heist — a solid solo active income source (~$700k avg per run).

bottlenecks.label: 💊 Not selling to Street Dealers
bottlenecks.solution: Visit 3 Street Dealers daily (~15 min for ~$202-250K). Requires MC businesses + Acid Lab stocked.
bottlenecks.detail: Street Dealers refresh daily at 07:00 UTC. Sell Cocaine, Meth, Weed & Acid for ~$250K/day average with premiums. Best $/minute ratio in the game.

bottlenecks.label: No Auto Shop
bottlenecks.solution: Purchase Auto Shop ($1.8M) for robbery contracts (~$400-600K/hr solo)
bottlenecks.detail: Union Depository contract pays ~$300K for 30 min work. Great solo active income.

bottlenecks.label: No Car Wash (passive income)
bottlenecks.solution: Purchase Car Wash ($1.5M) + feeders for up to ~$23K/hr passive income
bottlenecks.detail: Car Wash generates passive income. Add Weed Farm ($715K) and Heli Tours ($750K) as feeders to maximize earnings.

bottlenecks.label: Maximize Stamina
bottlenecks.solution: Run, bike, or swim regularly to build stamina
bottlenecks.detail: Allows unlimited sprinting. Required for Mansion Yoga buff (+15% run speed).

compactPlan.title: Strength Critical for Survival
compactPlan.why: Strength provides damage resistance in all combat situations (not just melee). Low strength means you take significantly more damage from bullets, explosions, and falls. Critical for surviving Auto Shop contracts, heists, and PVP.
compactPlan.solution: Launch "Pier Pressure" mission → Punch NPCs (20 mins, free)

compactPlan.title: Rank Under 50 (Max Health & Armor Locked)
compactPlan.why: Rank 1 = ~50% max health. You die instantly in Auto Shop raids. Cannot carry full body armor. Makes combat-heavy content much harder.
compactPlan.solution: Run missions & heists (Cayo, Auto Shop, Security Contracts for RP + $). Rank 1 needs active grinding.

compactPlan.title: Fix Critical Strength Liability
compactPlan.why: Your Strength is 0% (0/5 bars). You take max damage. You cannot lead Heists safely.
compactPlan.methodDetails: Launch "Pier Pressure" alone. Go to the boardwalk. Punch pedestrians. Math: You need 800 punches to reach 40%. (~30 punches/min).
compactPlan.avoidMethod: Avoid: Golf (unless using "Infinite Putt" exploit). Normal golf takes 6+ hours.

compactPlan.title: 💊 Not selling to Street Dealers
compactPlan.why: Street Dealers refresh daily at 07:00 UTC. Sell Cocaine, Meth, Weed & Acid for ~$250K/day average with premiums. Best $/minute ratio in the game.
compactPlan.solution: Visit 3 Street Dealers daily (~15 min for ~$202-250K). Requires MC businesses + Acid Lab stocked.

compactPlan.title: San Andreas Flight School (0% â†’ 80%+)
compactPlan.why: Your Flying is 0% (0/5 bars). 80% below meta benchmark for heist leadership. Your Sparrow is unstable. Flight School fixes this AND pays ~$250k.
